base_score_threshold.reason: Score bucket 4-6 (below current threshold of 8.0) has 73% win rate, avg return 12.2% (n=1111). Lowering threshold would capture these profitable near-misses.
base_score_threshold.discrepancy_note: base_score_threshold uses score_efficacy — whether options hit a profitable price within 5 days of being scored (short-term movement). base_score_threshold_graded uses signal_grades — whether options were profitable at the actual hold exit (AI-recommended hold period). When they conflict it typically means options are peaking before the recommended exit: efficacy sees the early gain, graded sees the fade. This is not a code or logic error — it is an economic signal that hold timing may be misaligned with price behaviour. Both signals are shown as LOW-priority so you can choose a path: lower the threshold (capture short-term movers) or raise it (filter for options that hold value through the recommended exit). Review hold_adjustment before acting on either threshold signal.

base_score_threshold_graded.reason: Score bucket 12-14 has 8% win rate, avg return -44.4% at recommended exit (n=77, 90% CI [4%, 14%]) — negative expected value when held to the advised exit.
base_score_threshold_graded.discrepancy_note: base_score_threshold uses score_efficacy — whether options hit a profitable price within 5 days of being scored (short-term movement). base_score_threshold_graded uses signal_grades — whether options were profitable at the actual hold exit (AI-recommended hold period). When they conflict it typically means options are peaking before the recommended exit: efficacy sees the early gain, graded sees the fade. This is not a code or logic error — it is an economic signal that hold timing may be misaligned with price behaviour. Both signals are shown as LOW-priority so you can choose a path: lower the threshold (capture short-term movers) or raise it (filter for options that hold value through the recommended exit). Review hold_adjustment before acting on either threshold signal.

delta_range.reason: Delta bucket 0.25-0.35 has worst win rate (1%, n=3439). Review delta_good_min / delta_good_max in config.

expiry_window.reason: DTE range 21-30d has the lowest win rate (2%). Review expiry_good_min / expiry_good_max in config.
